description: A medical director wants to compare the performance of different primary care providers on key quality measures.

expected_outcome.value: The director accesses the analytics for provider-level reporting.

nodes.task_description: Select several key quality measures (e.g., HBP control, A1c control, cancer screening).

expected_outcome.value: The director chooses the measures they want to compare.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report that shows each provider's performance rate for the selected measures, benchmarked against the clinic average.

expected_outcome.value: The report allows the director to identify high-performing providers and those who may need additional support or training.
